observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with compression fault
Visual pattern suggesting crack in tablet
Localized deviation from normal pill appearance
mechanism_explanation: Inconsistent compression force during tablet pressing causes structural weakness.
severity_visual_description: critical crack in tablet visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Recalibrate tablet press force and verify powder fill weight.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the crack in tablet would be absent and surface appears normal.
